meta.project: Glenda Timola — Real Estate Agent Portfolio
meta.stack: Vite + React 19 + Tailwind v4 (CSS-first config, no tailwind.config.js)
meta.content: All data-driven via data/*.json — no CMS

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with scroll-aware glassmorphism, desktop links, mobile slide-in panel.

key-classes.default: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-all duration-500
key-classes.mobile-panel: fixed inset-0 z-[60] bg-navy/80 scrim + bg-white slide-in panel w-72 animate-slide-in
key-classes.desktop-links: hidden md:flex items-center gap-8 text-sm tracking-wide uppercase text-taupe hover:text-navy

behavior.logo-fade: Glenda Timola text fades from opacity-0 to opacity-100 on scroll

components.name: Hero
components.description: Full-screen hero with parallax background, gradient overlay, decorative grid pattern, agent photo (desktop only), CTA buttons.

key-classes.parallax-bg: absolute inset-0 overflow-hidden will-change-transform top-[-10%] h-[120%]
key-classes.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-navy/70 via-navy/55 to-navy/35
key-classes.pattern: absolute inset-0 opacity-[0.04] SVG grid pattern
key-classes.photo-desktop: hidden xl:block shrink-0 self-end h-[85vh] w-auto
key-classes.title: font-display text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-bold text-white
key-classes.cta-primary: bg-gold text-navy font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-gold/90 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
key-classes.cta-secondary: border border-white/30 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm

behavior.parallax: requestAnimationFrame, translateY(offset) with offset = scrollY * 0.3, positive direction (image moves down)
behavior.photo: Only shown on xl+ (1280px), positioned at bottom-left of hero
behavior.scroll-indicator: Animated bounce chevron at bottom center

components.name: MobilePortrait
components.description: Agent photo card that appears between hero and services on mobile/tablet. Hidden on xl+.

key-classes.container: relative xl:hidden -mt-16 z-20 px-6 max-w-6xl mx-auto
key-classes.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(27,42,74,0.12)] border border-cream p-5 flex items-center gap-5

components.name: Services
components.description: Services section with glassmorphism cards on navy background, gold glow orbs, responsive grid.

key-classes.glow-orbs: absolute inset-0 opacity-[0.03] with rounded-full bg-gold blur-3xl positioned top-left and bottom-right
key-classes.card: w-full sm:w-[calc(50%-0.75rem)] lg:w-[calc(25%-1.125rem)] bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300
key-classes.title: font-display font-bold text-lg text-white

components.name: FeaturedListings
components.description: Featured properties section with 3-tier responsive layout: mobile blog, tablet horizontal, desktop 3-column card grid.

behavior.responsive: < md: stacked blog-style | md-lg: image left (w-56), text right | lg+: 3-column grid

change: adjust grid columns for different counts

components.name: Highlights (Homepage)
components.description: Achievement cards on navy glassmorphism background. 3-column grid with expandable descriptions (click card or See More). Full image preview on click? Not on homepage — cards use first image as thumbnail only.

key-classes.section: py-24 bg-navy relative overflow-hidden with gold glow orbs
key-classes.card: rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 cursor-pointer
key-classes.date-pill: bg-gold/20 text-gold text-[11px] font-bold px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider
key-classes.description: text-white/60 text-sm leading-relaxed line-clamp-2 (collapsed) / no clamp (expanded)

behavior.expand: Click card or 'See More' button toggles line-clamp-2. Reference links have stopPropagation.
behavior.featured-filter: Only items with featured: true in data/highlights.json

components.name: HighlightsPage (Timeline)
components.description: Full timeline page at /highlights. Desktop: vertical timeline with gold line and star nodes. Mobile: clean stacked layout. Each entry has a carousel canvas (listing-detail style) with prev/next, dot indicators, fullscreen lightbox.

key-classes.hero-banner: pt-32 pb-24 bg-navy relative overflow-hidden with gold glow orbs
key-classes.back-link: inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-taupe hover:text-gold text-sm uppercase tracking-wide
key-classes.timeline-line: hidden md:block absolute left-[19px] top-0 bottom-0 w-0.5 bg-gradient-to-b from-gold via-gold/40 to-transparent
key-classes.timeline-node: hidden md:flex absolute left-0 top-1 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-navy border-2 border-gold items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_12px_rgba(201,168,76,0.2)]
key-classes.carousel: relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-[#1a1a1a] aspect-[16/9] flex items-center justify-center
key-classes.carousel-dots: active: bg-gold w-5, inactive: bg-white/60 w-2
key-classes.fullscreen: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/95 with close button, nav arrows, bottom counter

behavior.mobile-timeline: Line and nodes hidden, full-width content
behavior.carousel: Per-entry image viewer. Click opens fullscreen lightbox. Keyboard nav (Escape, Arrow keys).
behavior.loading: Spinner shown while carousel image loads, hidden on img onLoad

components.name: ListingDetail
components.description: Individual listing page at /listing/:id. Image carousel with fullscreen lightbox, breadcrumbs, specs panel, markdown caption, sidebar with price and contact CTAs. Separate desktop and mobile layouts.

key-classes.desktop: hidden lg:block max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6 py-12
key-classes.carousel: relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-[#1a1a1a] aspect-[16/9] flex items-center justify-center
key-classes.carousel-dots: active: bg-gold w-6, inactive: bg-white/70 w-2
key-classes.specs: font-display text-2xl font-bold text-navy with labels in text-taupe text-xs uppercase

behavior.image-preload: new Image() in useEffect for carousel + fullscreen, loading spinner
behavior.seo: Per-page OG tags via react-helmet-async, Apartment schema.org JSON-LD

components.name: ListingsPage
components.description: All listings grid page at /listings. BreadcrumbList schema, 3-column grid of listing cards.
components.key-classes: Same card pattern as FeaturedListings desktop grid

components.name: Contact
components.description: Contact section with form (EmailJS direct fetch) and info blocks (phone, email, Facebook, location). Each info block has unique accent color.

key-classes.input: w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border border-cream bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-navy/20 focus:border-navy text-sm
key-classes.submit: w-full bg-gold text-navy font-semibold py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-gold/90 uppercase tracking-wide text-sm
key-classes.info-icon-wrapper: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center shrink-0
key-classes.info-icon-colors: Phone: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 | Email: bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 | Facebook: bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 | Service Area: bg-orange-50 text-orange-600

behavior.form-action: POST to https://api.emailjs.com/api/v1.0/email/send with service_id, template_id, user_id
behavior.info-blocks: Phone renders tel: link, Email renders mailto: link, Facebook renders external link with target=_blank

change: info-icons if adding new block types

components.name: Testimonials
components.description: Testimonials section (currently disabled). Supports text, image screenshots with lightbox, YouTube embeds, and direct video (mp4) playback.

components.name: TestimonialsPage
components.description: Full testimonials page at /testimonials (currently disabled via sections.json). Same media components as Testimonials.

components.name: FAQ
components.description: Accordion-style FAQ section with expand/collapse animation, FAQPage schema.org structured data injected via Helmet.

key-classes.accordion: border border-cream rounded-xl overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300
key-classes.button: w-full flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-5 text-left hover:bg-cream/50
key-classes.panel: transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden max-h-0 opacity-0 / max-h-[500px] opacity-100

components.name: Footer
components.description: Simple dark footer with name, title, copyright.

key-classes.container: max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-6

components.name: ScrollToTop
components.description: Floating back-to-top button (gold circle with chevron) appears after 400px scroll.

key-classes.button: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-40 w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gold text-navy shadow-lg hover:bg-navy hover:text-gold

components.name: SEO
components.description: React component wrapping react-helmet-async for per-page SEO meta, OG tags, canonical URL, JSON-LD.
components.defaults: Reads from data/profile.json for brand name, title, tagline, photo

design-patterns.name: Scroll Reveal
design-patterns.usage: Fade-in on scroll via IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.05, 0.6s ease-out). No y-translation — pure opacity.
design-patterns.implementation: Module-level observer in App.jsx, .scroll-reveal CSS class, observe() called on route change + 300ms timeout

design-patterns.name: Image Carousel
design-patterns.usage: Listing detail + highlights timeline. bg-[#1a1a1a] container, aspect-[16/9], prev/next buttons, dot indicators, click-to-fullscreen.
design-patterns.implementation: State: currentIndex. useEffect preloads next image via new Image(). Fullscreen: fixed z-50 overlay with keyboard nav.

design-patterns.name: Glassmorphism on Navy
design-patterns.usage: Cards on dark sections (Services, Highlights homepage). bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10
design-patterns.implementation: Section bg-navy with gold glow orbs (absolute blur-3xl circles at 3% opacity)

design-patterns.name: Blog-Style on Mobile, Grid on Desktop
design-patterns.usage: FeaturedListings: < lg stacked articles, lg+ card grid. HighlightsPage: mobile no timeline, desktop full timeline.
design-patterns.implementation: Duplicate layout markup with responsive visibility classes (lg:hidden / hidden lg:...)

design-patterns.name: Feature Toggles
design-patterns.usage: data/sections.json controls which homepage sections render and whether listing specs show.
design-patterns.implementation: sectionMap + order array in App.jsx filters by sections.home[key].enabled. Specs gated by sections.listingSpecs.enabled

design-patterns.name: Data-Driven Content
design-patterns.usage: Every section reads from data/*.json. No hardcoded content in components.
design-patterns.implementation: JSON files imported directly into components. Images hosted on HubSpot CDN, referenced by URL.

breakpoints.sm: 640px — gold line visible in blog entries
breakpoints.md: 768px — tablet horizontal layout, timeline visible, 2-col grids
breakpoints.lg: 1024px — desktop card grids (3-col), mobile blog hidden
breakpoints.xl: 1280px — hero photo visible, mobile menu trigger

common-patterns: Stack vertically on mobile, horizontal on md/tablet, multi-column grid on lg+
Hidden timeline decoration on mobile, visible on md+
Responsive typography: text-2xl on mobile, text-3xl on desktop for blog titles
Section padding: py-24 (consistent across all sections)

data-files.purpose: Agent name, title, tagline, bio, photo URL, languages, area
Service cards with icon key, title, description
All property listings with images, specs, caption, status, price
Achievements with images, dates, descriptions, reference links, featured flag
Form fields, info blocks, button text
Feature toggles for homepage sections + listingSpecs
Build-time OG tag injection, sitemap generation

to-reuse: Copy src/components/*.jsx (all are self-contained, no prop drilling)
to-change: vite.config.js: siteUrl, ogImage, profile import path
to-install: npm install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite react-router-dom react-helmet-async marked
